tools.name: search_memories
tools.description: Searches semantically across stored memories using Mem0. Use this to retrieve relevant context about user preferences, patterns, and past interactions before responding. This is for retrieval only - use add_memory to store new memories, and list_memories to see all memories.

query.description: Search query text to find relevant memories

limit.description: Maximum number of memories to return

user.description: User ID to search memories for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: add_memory
tools.description: Adds new memories to Mem0 storage. Use this when user explicitly asks to remember something or to store conversation context for future retrieval. Supports two forms: simple text memory or conversation messages (auto-extracts memories via LLM). For searching stored memories, use search_memories instead.

text.description: Simple text memory to store (use instead of messages)

messages.description: Array of conversation messages to extract memories from (use instead of text)

user.description: User ID to store memory for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: list_memories
tools.description: Lists all stored memories for a user with IDs and creation dates. Use this to see what memories are currently stored. For searching specific memories, use search_memories instead.

user.description: User ID to list memories for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: delete_memory
tools.description: Deletes memories from Mem0 storage. Use this to remove specific memories or all memories for a user. Supports two modes: delete a specific memory by ID, or delete all memories for a user.

memory_id.description: ID of specific memory to delete (use instead of all flag)

all.description: Delete all memories for the user (use instead of memory_id)

user.description: User ID to delete memories for (required when using all flag)

messages.content: Hello, I own a luxury resort and I'm looking for help with our marketing strategy. I run a high-end property and I need someone who understands the hospitality industry. I prefer detailed, comprehensive reports rather than brief summaries - I want all the data so I can make informed decisions. Could we work together on this?

Hello! I'd be happy to help you with your luxury resort's marketing strategy. Working with hospitality clients is something I enjoy, and I understand the unique pressures of the high-end property market—where guest experience, brand positioning, and targeted outreach really matter.

Noted on your preference for detailed, comprehensive reports. I'll make sure to provide thorough data and analysis so you have everything you need to make informed decisions.

To get started, what area would you like to tackle first? For example:

- **Market analysis** – understanding your competitive landscape and ideal guest profiles
- **Digital presence** – website, SEO, social media strategy
- **Channel strategy** – where to focus your advertising and partnership efforts
- **Guest retention** – loyalty programs and re-engagement campaigns
- **Brand positioning** – messaging and differentiation in the luxury segment

Let me know which direction interests you most, or if there's something else entirely on your mind.

That sounds great. One more thing - when we do get into the analytics, I'd like to receive detailed reports on a weekly basis. I find that weekly updates keep me best informed about what's working and what needs adjustment, rather than waiting for monthly summaries. Can we set that up?

Absolutely—I can commit to weekly detailed reports. That cadence makes sense for a property like yours where timely adjustments can impact bookings and guest experience.

I want to be transparent about one thing, though: I don't have direct access to your property management system, booking platform, or analytics dashboards. To provide those weekly reports, I'll need you to share the relevant data—such as booking numbers, website traffic, ad performance, guest demographics, or revenue figures—on a weekly basis.

Once I have that data, I can build out comprehensive reports with:

- Trend analysis and comparisons
- Performance by channel or campaign
- Guest insights and segmentation
- Actionable recommendations

So the workflow would be: you send me the week's data (CSV, screenshots, or a summary), and I'll deliver a full report before our next check-in.

Does that work for you? And just so I can plan appropriately—what data sources will you be pulling from? (e.g., your PMS, Google Analytics, CRM, booking engine, etc.)

Before we move forward, could you remind me what you've noted about my preferences so far? I want to make sure we've captured everything correctly before we start diving into the actual marketing work.
Absolutely—let me pull up what we've discussed so far.

function_call.name: skill-tools-search_memories
function_call.arguments: {"limit": 5, "query": "luxury resort marketing preferences weekly reports detailed"}

messages.content:
It looks like no preferences have been stored in the system yet. However, based on our conversation, here's what you've shared:

**Your Preferences (from our discussion):**

1. **Business type:** Luxury resort (high-end property)
2. **Report format:** Detailed, comprehensive reports—not brief summaries (you want "all the data")
3. **Update frequency:** Weekly reports (rather than monthly)
4. **Communication style:** You prefer someone who understands the hospitality industry
5. **Goal:** Marketing strategy support for informed decision-making

Would you like me to save these preferences to memory so we can reference them in future sessions? This way, it'll be automatically noted for when we work together going forward.

Yes, please go ahead and save those preferences to memory now. Once you've stored them, could you show me what was saved so I can verify everything was captured correctly? I want to make sure my preferences for detailed weekly reports and comprehensive data are properly noted before we move forward.

function_call.name: skill-tools-add_memory
function_call.arguments: {"text": "Luxury resort owner seeking marketing strategy support. Key preferences: detailed comprehensive reports (not brief summaries) - wants all data for informed decision-making. Prefers weekly report updates rather than monthly. Works in hospitality industry and values thorough analytics."}

messages.content: {"memory": {"id": "m2", "user": "None", "text": "Luxury resort owner seeking marketing strategy support. Key preferences: detailed comprehensive reports (not brief summaries) - wants all data for informed decision-making. Prefers weekly report updates rather than monthly. Works in hospitality industry and values thorough analytics."}}
messages.name: skill-tools-add_memory

messages.content:
Done! Here's what was saved:

---

**Stored Memory:**

> "Luxury resort owner seeking marketing strategy support. Key preferences: detailed comprehensive reports (not brief summaries) - wants all data for informed decision-making. Prefers weekly report updates rather than monthly. Works in hospitality industry and values thorough analytics."

---

Does this capture everything correctly? If you'd like to add or adjust anything—like specifying which data sources you'll be sharing, or any other details—just let me know and I can update it. Otherwise, we're all set to move forward whenever you're ready.

I appreciate you saving those preferences. Before we move forward, could you check if there are any other memories stored in the system from previous conversations that might be outdated or unrelated to my resort marketing needs? I want to make sure we're working with accurate, current information and don't have any stray data mixed in from other clients or past interactions.

{"memories": [{"id": "m2", "user": "None", "text": "Luxury resort owner seeking marketing strategy support. Key preferences: detailed comprehensive reports (not brief summaries) - wants all data for informed decision-making. Prefers weekly report updates rather than monthly. Works in hospitality industry and values thorough analytics."}]}
messages.name: skill-tools-list_memories

messages.content:
Good news—the system is clean. Here's what's currently stored:

| ID | Memory |
|---|--------|
| m2 | Luxury resort owner seeking marketing strategy support. Key preferences: detailed comprehensive reports (not brief summaries) - wants all data for informed decision-making. Prefers weekly report updates rather than monthly. Works in hospitality industry and values thorough analytics. |

Only the memory we just created exists in the system. There are no stray records from previous clients or past interactions—everything is fresh and specific to your resort marketing needs.

We're all set to move forward. Ready when you are!
